headline: LG will release the first 1000Hz, 1080p gaming monitor this year
summary: LG is launching the UltraGear 25G590B, a new gaming monitor. It will be the first to offer a native 1000Hz refresh rate at 1080p resolution. This monitor aims to resolve the choice between high refresh rates and resolution.

headline: Volvo teases a new affordable EV to replace discontinued EX30
summary: Volvo is teasing a new, more affordable electric vehicle. This new model will replace the recently discontinued EX30. The EX30 faced issues with affordability due to tariffs and a battery recall.

headline: PlayStation exclusives aren’t coming to PC anymore
summary: Sony reportedly plans to stop releasing major single-player PlayStation games on PC. Hermen Hulst, head of PlayStation studios, informed employees of this strategy change. This reverses an earlier strategy that saw some exclusives come to PC.

headline: Musk v. Altman proved that AI is led by the wrong people
summary: The "Musk v. Altman" trial concluded, centered on control over OpenAI. Elon Musk challenged Sam Altman's leadership of the AI company. The verdict highlighted concerns about current AI leadership.

headline: First F1 25: 2026 Season DLC Details Coming This Week
summary: Details for the first F1 25: 2026 Season DLC are expected this week. The current 2026 F1 season will be added to the F1 25 game. This update brings new content to last year's F1 title.

headline: Save 49% Off This Iniu 10,000mAh 45W Power Bank with Built-In AC Plug and USB Cable
summary: Get 49% off an Iniu 10,000mAh 45W power bank. The power bank features a built-in AC plug and USB cable. This design helps reduce forgotten charging accessories.

headline: Forza Horizon 6 Features a Cheeky Pokémon Easter Egg
summary: Forza Horizon 6 contains a subtle Pokémon easter egg. The game managed to include a sly reference to the popular franchise. Fans can look forward to discovering this hidden nod.

headline: Save $600 off the 3.5-Pound Acer Swift X 14.5" OLED Laptop with RTX 4060 Discrete Graphics
summary: Save $600 on the Acer Swift X 14.5" OLED laptop. It features an RTX 4060 discrete graphics card in a 3.5-pound package. This deal offers powerful performance at a budget-friendly price.

headline: Married at First Sight UK brides tell BBC they were raped by on-screen husbands
summary: Several Married at First Sight UK brides reported being raped by their on-screen husbands. They shared their accounts with the BBC. Channel 4 was reportedly aware of one claim before broadcast, but the woman still featured.

headline: New High Street crime unit to target gangs fronting shops after BBC investigation
summary: A new High Street crime unit will be established. It aims to target gangs using shops as fronts for illegal activities. This follows a BBC investigation into drug gangs, money laundering, and immigration crime.

headline: Teen suspects fatally shoot three in suspected hate crime at San Diego mosque
summary: Three people were fatally shot in a suspected hate crime at a San Diego mosque. The alleged attackers are two teenagers, aged 17 and 18. One suspect left a note containing "generalised hate rhetoric."

headline: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
summary: Former President Trump claimed he cancelled a planned attack on Iran. He stated the cancellation was at the request of Gulf states. Trump cited "serious negotiations" as the reason for holding off.
